message:
test(abi): expand coverage for dlfcn, malloc reentry, stdio positional printf

Add dl_iterate_phdr_invokes_callback_with_host_phdr_data test that verifies
the bootstrap-retry path delivers valid dl_phdr_info records to callbacks.

Extend malloc_abi_test to use the new reentry-depth test hooks to exercise
the reentrant-allocator fallback path, and tighten the calloc-overflow
assertion to always expect NULL.

Add stdio_abi_test.rs with printf positional-argument tests covering %1$s
reordering, mixed positional/sequential detection, and float %1$f dispatch.

Append ld_preload_smoke.sh smoke marker for the positional printf path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
